title: test_agent_api_post_and_get_requests
description: Verify that the POST and GET requests to the /app/api/agent endpoint correctly handle goal submission and agent orchestration, including proper request validation and response formatting.

title: test_history_api_post_and_get_requests
description: Verify that the POST and GET requests to the /app/api/history endpoint correctly retrieve and store task history data, ensuring data integrity and correct filtering based on user context.

title: test_x402_api_verify_and_settle
description: Verify that the /app/api/x402/* endpoints correctly perform HTTP 402 paywall verification, authorize USDT micro-payments within user-defined budgets, and handle replay protection mechanisms.
